channel.title: Daily AI Digest
channel.description: Curated AI/ML signals — zero LLMs, pure algorithmic curation

item.title: You Only Judge Once: Multi-response Reward Modeling in a Single Forward Pass
item.description: 💬 Active HN discussion (32 comments)

item.title: LARY: A Latent Action Representation Yielding Benchmark for Generalizable Vision-to-Action Alignment
item.description: LARY: A Latent Action Representation Yielding Benchmark for Generalizable Vision-to-Action Alignment

item.title: KnowRL: Boosting LLM Reasoning via Reinforcement Learning with Minimal-Sufficient Knowledge Guidance
item.description: 💬 Major HN discussion (171 comments) · 📄 Featured on Hugging Face Daily Papers — RLVR improves reasoning in large language models, but its effectiveness is often limited by severe reward sparsity on hard problems. Recent hint-based RL methods mitigate sparsity by injecting partial solutions or abstract templates, yet they typically scale guidance by adding more tokens, which ...

item.title: Accelerating Speculative Decoding with Block Diffusion Draft Trees
item.description: 📄 New in cs.CL — Speculative decoding accelerates autoregressive language models by using a lightweight drafter to propose multiple future tokens, which the target model then verifies in parallel. DFlash shows that a block diffusion drafter can generate an entire draft block in a single forward pass and achieve s...

item.title: Toward Autonomous Long-Horizon Engineering for ML Research
item.description: 📄 New in cs.CL — Autonomous AI research has advanced rapidly, but long-horizon ML research engineering remains difficult: agents must sustain coherent progress across task comprehension, environment setup, implementation, experimentation, and debugging over hours or days. We introduce AiScientist, a system for au...

item.title: Rethinking On-Policy Distillation of Large Language Models: Phenomenology, Mechanism, and Recipe
item.description: 📄 New in cs.LG, cs.AI — On-policy distillation (OPD) has become a core technique in the post-training of large language models, yet its training dynamics remain poorly understood. This paper provides a systematic investigation of OPD dynamics and mechanisms. We first identify that two conditions govern whether OPD succe...

item.title: Generative Refinement Networks for Visual Synthesis
item.description: 📄 New in cs.CV — While diffusion models dominate the field of visual generation, they are computationally inefficient, applying a uniform computational effort regardless of different complexity. In contrast, autoregressive (AR) models are inherently complexity-aware, as evidenced by their variable likelihoods, bu...

item.title: Towards Long-horizon Agentic Multimodal Search
item.description: 📄 New in cs.CV, cs.AI — Multimodal deep search agents have shown great potential in solving complex tasks by iteratively collecting textual and visual evidence. However, managing the heterogeneous information and high token costs associated with multimodal inputs over long horizons remains a critical challenge, as exist...

item.title: VideoFlexTok: Flexible-Length Coarse-to-Fine Video Tokenization
item.description: 📄 New in cs.CV, cs.LG — Visual tokenizers map high-dimensional raw pixels into a compressed representation for downstream modeling. Beyond compression, tokenizers dictate what information is preserved and how it is organized. A de facto standard approach to video tokenization is to represent a video as a spatiotemporal ...

item.title: Lyra 2.0: Explorable Generative 3D Worlds
item.description: 📄 New in cs.CV — Recent advances in video generation enable a new paradigm for 3D scene creation: generating camera-controlled videos that simulate scene walkthroughs, then lifting them to 3D via feed-forward reconstruction techniques. This generative reconstruction approach combines the visual fidelity and creat...

item.title: How AI Agents Are Powering China’s New One-Person Companies

item.title: alirezarezvani / claude-skills
item.description: ⭐ 195 GitHub stars today · ⭐ 11.2k total stars — 232+ Claude Code skills & agent plugins for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, and 8 more coding agents — engineering, marketing, product, compliance, C-level advisory.
